description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows (Qt 5, x86) that triggers on push and pull request events. Run a windows-latest job that checks out the repository, installs Qt 5.15.2 for win32_msvc2019, configures CMake with specific generator and architecture, builds the project in Release mode, runs tests, packages the application with windeployqt, copies OpenSSL DLLs, and uploads the resulting artifact.
